name: NF - My 2 Cents (2026) (IT)
plot: When his friend Wild Boar lands himself in hot water with organized crime, Zero and the gang unite to save him while barely coping with their own lives.

name: NF - Strip Law (2026) (US)
plot: An uptight lawyer teams with a flashy Las Vegas magician to bring some pizzazz to the city's stupidest cases in this adult animated comedy.
cast: Adam Scott, Janelle James, Keith David, Stephen Root, Shannon Gisela

name: NF - Solar Opposites (2020) (US)
plot: A family of aliens from a much better world must take refuge in middle America after the destruction of their planet. Their mission: protect the Pupa, a living super computer that will one day evolve into its true form, consume them and terraform the Earth.
cast: Dan Stevens, Thomas Middleditch, Sean Giambrone, Mary Mack

name: NF - Archer (2009) (US)
plot: Sterling Archer is the world's most daunting spy. He works for ISIS, a spy agency run by his mother. In between dealing with his boss and his co-workers - one of whom is his ex-girlfriend - Archer manages to annoy or seduce everyone that crosses his path. His antics are only excusable because at the end of the day, he still somehow always manages to thwart whatever crises was threatening mankind.
cast: H. Jon Benjamin, Judy Greer, Amber Nash, Chris Parnell, Aisha Tyler, Lucky Yates

name: NF - Big Mouth (2017) (US)
plot: Teenage friends find their lives upended by the wonders and horrors of puberty in this edgy comedy from real-life pals Nick Kroll and Andrew Goldberg.
cast: Nick Kroll, John Mulaney, Jessi Klein, Jason Mantzoukas, Maya Rudolph, Fred Armisen, Jordan Peele
director: Mark Levin, Nick Kroll, Jennifer Flackett

name: NF - BoJack Horseman (2014) (US)
plot: Meet the most beloved sitcom horse of the '90s , 20 years later. He's a curmudgeon with a heart of...not quite gold...but something like gold. Copper?
cast: Will Arnett, Aaron Paul, Alison Brie, Amy Sedaris, Paul F. Tompkins

name: NF - Hoops (2020) (US)
plot: A foul-mouthed high school basketball coach is sure he'll hit the big leagues if he can only turn his terrible team around. Good luck with that.
cast: Jake Johnson, Rob Riggle, Natasha Leggero, Cleo King, Ron Funches, A.D. Miles, Gil Ozeri, Sam Richardson
